title: consolida trigonelloides
intro: Consolida trigonelloides, also known as larkspur or delphinium consolida, is a perennial flowering plant in the borage family. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include its ability to stimulate the nervous system and promote relaxation. The plant's health benefits are attributed to its antispasmodic, sedative, and anti-inflammatory properties, making it useful in treating conditions such as anxiety, insomnia, and muscle spasms. Herbal preparations of Consolida trigonelloides include tinctures, teas, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
